purpose: Stores user-curated saved listing references for optional revisit workflows.

important_fields.name: id
important_fields.note: Primary identifier for saved-item management actions.

important_fields.name: user_id
important_fields.note: Owner of the saved listing item.

important_fields.name: listing_id
important_fields.note: Listing reference; unique per user + listing pair.

important_fields.name: saved_at
important_fields.note: Orders saved items and supports user recall context.

notes: Soft delete can be used for undo-friendly UX.
